name: workflow
description: An autonomous dev loop plus context management: /orchestrate runs N rounds of parallel issue-solving (implementers in isolated git worktrees, a merger that merges in dependency order and resolves conflicts under the done-check, then per-issue my-review reviews each built slice at the tier's reviewer model — surfacing findings and filing mock-debt follow-ups from its central-mechanism audit), /pipeline runs one task through a plan-build-review chain (models routed by complexity tier) with severity-routed fixes, and a threshold-driven watchdog drives deliberate, early /clear and /handoff as the window fills, auto-resuming the in-flight plan.
